name: swingLoop
purpose: Endless swinging — continuous pendulum motion around a top pivot (transform-origin top, compositor-friendly).
template:
{{css target}} { transform-origin: top center; animation: motion-swingLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-swingLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: rotate(-{{css params.angle}}deg) } to { transform: rotate({{css params.angle}}deg) } }
